organization.name: SecureTech AV Designs Private Limited
organization.description: India's #1 AV system integrator providing end-to-end audio visual solutions including architectural acoustics, professional audio systems, video conferencing, smart classrooms, auditorium sound systems, lighting design, IT infrastructure, and AV consultation.

services.name: Architectural Acoustics
services.description: Sound isolation, acoustic treatment, noise control, room acoustics optimization for auditoriums, studios, and commercial spaces.

services.name: Audio Visual Systems
services.description: Professional audio systems, video walls, projection systems, conferencing solutions, digital signage for corporate and public spaces.

services.name: Lighting Architecture
services.description: Architectural lighting design, stage lighting, LED installations, smart lighting control for venues and buildings.

services.name: Information Technology
services.description: IT infrastructure, network design, structured cabling, server rooms, and technology integration.

services.name: Project Management
services.description: End-to-end AV project planning, execution, coordination, and delivery management.

services.name: Post Project Services
services.description: Annual maintenance contracts, technical support, system upgrades, and ongoing AV support services.
